Appearances:
Plaintiff JON WU is present.
MARINA R. FRANCO, Attorney for Plaintiff
Defendant HEATHER MALONE is present.
Defendant JOHN FORD is not present.
Attorney SANGEETHA RAO appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem ELAN LAMBERT litigants and counsel confer in Dept 501A for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of FEBRUARY 24, 2014 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
